title: Access Denied error when using SuiteCRM API
symptom: When executing the HTTP Request node to access the SuiteCRM API, an 'Access Denied' error is returned. This prevents successful authentication and token retrieval.
applies_when: Attempting to authenticate with SuiteCRM API
not_this_if: Using the correct endpoint and credentials
Error does not occur when using Postman
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect API endpoint usage, improper authentication method, or missing required parameters. SuiteCRM requires specific configurations for OAuth2 authentication that must be followed precisely.
fix_steps: Create a user specifically for OAuth2 authentication in SuiteCRM.
Identify the correct API endpoint based on your SuiteCRM version, e.g., https://[My-Domain]/api/oauth/access_token.
Set the HTTP Request Method to POST.
Include the required body parameters: grant_type (client_credentials), client_id, and client_secret.
Execute the HTTP Request node to retrieve the access token.
agent_instruction: Follow the outlined steps to configure the HTTP Request node for SuiteCRM API authentication.
